voice_adherence.weakest_moment: Cường nghĩ. Thật sự nghĩ — dùng 4.9% não còn lại để suy nghĩ về câu hỏi.
voice_adherence.fix: Replace with a body-before-emotion physical response: 'Huyết áp dồn lên thái dương. Đau nhói ở sống mũi. Não anh chạy — 4.9% còn lại — cố gắng xử lý câu hỏi như một gói tin bị lỗi.'
voice_adherence.note: The chapter largely nails the cold, surgical tone and the vocabulary wells (ping, bộ đệm, nhiễu, render). Sentence rhythm varies well between clipped action beats and longer sensory passages. But several emotional moments tell rather than manifesting through the body, violating the 'Body Before Emotion' principle.

beat_coverage.weakest_moment: The entire sequence of Cường overloading the buffer with millions of write override commands — this is the chapter's core action, yet it's described in abstract, repetitive summary rather than lived experience.
beat_coverage.fix: Dramatize the physical cost of sending these commands. Show his body convulsing in the tank, the specific sensations of neural overload, the gradual loss of motor control. Make us feel each million commands as a physical event, not a number ticking up.
beat_coverage.note: All four outline beats are present but Beat 1 (overloading the system) is summarized rather than dramatized. The buffer percentage ticking up reads like a status screen, not a scene. Beats 2-4 are better executed, especially Lan's final smile.

character_voice.weakest_moment: "Anh xin lỗi." Câu nói thoát ra trước khi anh kịp suy nghĩ. Không phải phong cách của anh. Anh không xin lỗi. Anh ghi nhận, phân loại, bỏ qua.
character_voice.fix: If he apologizes, it should come out wrong — truncated, mechanical, like a corrupted file. Not a clean 'Anh xin lỗi' followed by narratorial explanation. Try: 'Xin—' Dừng. Từ chưa từng tồn tại trong bộ từ vựng. '...Ghi nhận. Lỗi hệ thống. Bỏ qua.'
character_voice.note: Cường's voice is mostly consistent — clipped, technical, number-driven. But the apology moment and several emotional reflections ('Anh là người buông tay') feel like a different, more introspective character. Lan's voice is stronger — the glitchy repetition, the wrong-context metaphors.

plants_seeded.weakest_moment: The 47.3 Hz frequency callback — mentioned multiple times but never seeded subtly in this chapter; it's just repeated from previous context as a refrain.
plants_seeded.fix: The frequency should appear once, obliquely, in an unexpected context — perhaps the hum of the water pump matches 47.3 Hz, or his heartbeat briefly syncs to it before the final disconnect. Let the reader make the connection.
plants_seeded.note: The outline says 'Không có' for gieo mầm, so no plants were required. The vết sẹo resolution is handled. The 8 nhịp/phút callback to Lan's real body is effective but stated too directly.

prose_quality.weakest_sentence: Không phải đau đầu. Đau toàn bộ cơ thể. Từng dây thần kinh cùng lúc phát tín hiệu báo động — như hàng triệu cây kim đâm xuyên qua da, cơ, xương, nội tạng.
prose_quality.fix: The 'hàng triệu cây kim' metaphor is generic pain description. Replace with something from Cường's vocabulary well: 'Từng dây thần kinh phát tín hiệu lỗi — ping vô hạn, packet loss 100%, mọi cổng nhận cùng lúc báo đỏ. Cơ thể anh là một server đang cháy.'
prose_quality.strongest_sentence: Nước mắt đứng yên trên má — một khối dữ liệu bị đóng băng, không đủ thông tin để render chuyển động.
prose_quality.note: Strong when leaning into the technical vocabulary wells. Weak when falling back on generic emotional language. The 'tinh' sound of a tear falling is a perfect recurring motif. Paragraph rhythm varies well but several passages repeat the same structure (short declarative → elaboration → technical detail).

continuity.note: Picks up directly from the previous chapter's ending — Cường at 95.1% brain damage, server deleted, Lan freed. The vết sẹo callback tracks. The 47.3 Hz resonance continues. However, the previous chapter ended with him already losing consciousness ('Rồi tắt'), which makes his reawakening in this chapter feel slightly disconnected — a brief acknowledgment of the gap would help.

violations: Outline specifies 'Cường bắt đầu quá tải hệ thống bằng cách gửi hàng triệu lệnh ghi đè cùng lúc' as the opening action, but the chapter has him first wandering in white space, finding a green dot, then beginning — a significant structural deviation from the planned beat sequence.

The 'Hemera-Root đã khóa mọi thứ. Giám đốc Y khoa đã chặn quá trình ngắt kết nối' line introduces new information not established in canon — when did this happen? The previous chapter showed Cường deleting the server himself.

Bộ đệm mechanics (sending write override commands to overflow a buffer) are not established in the magic system rules. The system describes ping, neural sync, and memory fragmentation — not buffer overflow as a deliberate action.
The chapter refers to 'Lan' by name throughout, but canon only calls her 'Kẻ Đuổi' or 'Nàng' — the name 'Lan' is not established in any planning document.
canon_compliance.note: The most significant issue is the introduction of 'Lan' as a name — this character has never been named in the planning docs. Either this was established in an earlier chapter (not provided) or it's a canon violation. The buffer overflow mechanic also needs grounding in established rules.

lore_integration.weakest_moment: The buffer overflow sequence — while dramatic, it doesn't connect to established lore about how the Neural Mantle system actually works. It reads more like generic hacking than the specific neurological technology described in world.md.
lore_integration.fix: Ground the overflow in established mechanics: instead of 'write override commands,' describe it as flooding neural pathways with redundant sensory data — overwhelming the synapses that store virtual memories. Use the vocabulary wells: 'đổ bộ ngược,' 'nhiễu tín hiệu,' 'quá tải dây thần kinh.'
lore_integration.note: Strong integration of specific details: 1.2 km distance to St. Vincent, Bệnh nhân số 4, 8 nhịp/phút, buồng triệt giác specs, the hầm Haymarket sensory details (ozon, cáp quang, máy điều hòa). The world does work here — it's not just set dressing.

engagement.weakest_moment: The middle section — from 'Bốn năm' through the millions of commands — where the chapter becomes a technical exercise in buffer percentages ticking upward. Tension flatlines here because we're watching a progress bar, not experiencing a scene.
engagement.fix: Interleave the command-sending with physical consequences — each million commands costs him something. A memory erased. A sensation lost. The ability to smell ozone fading. His daughter's face (no — he doesn't have family memories). The taste of bread from the corner shop. Make the buffer filling a countdown to personal annihilation, not just a number.
engagement.note: The opening is atmospheric and the final Lan scene is genuinely moving — her imperfect smile, the tear that falls with a 'tinh' sound. But the middle sags. The chapter's best moments (Lan's dialogue, the vết sẹo dissolving) are strong enough to carry it, but the technical padding between them dilutes the impact.

three_weakest_sentences: Không phải đau đầu. Đau toàn bộ cơ thể. Từng dây thần kinh cùng lúc phát tín hiệu báo động — như hàng triệu cây kim đâm xuyên qua da, cơ, xương, nội tạng.
Cường nghĩ. Thật sự nghĩ — dùng 4.9% não còn lại để suy nghĩ về câu hỏi.
Anh gửi mười lệnh. Một trăm lệnh. Một ngàn.
three_strongest_sentences: Nước mắt đứng yên trên má — một khối dữ liệu bị đóng băng, không đủ thông tin để render chuyển động.
Nếp nhăn nhỏ ở đuôi mắt — chi tiết chưa từng xuất hiện trong render trước đây, vì anh chưa từng lập trình nếp nhăn. Nó đến từ đâu đó khác. Từ dữ liệu sinh tồn của Bệnh nhân số 4.
Nhớ mùi hoa sữa không nở ở Sydney. Nhớ nước mắt rơi trên khoảng trắng tạo ra âm thanh tinh.
ai_patterns_detected: Uniform paragraph rhythm in the middle section — many paragraphs follow the same pattern: short setup sentence → technical elaboration → buffer percentage update.

The 'Not X. Y.' rhetorical structure appears repeatedly: 'Không phải đau đầu. Đau toàn bộ cơ thể.' / 'Không phải tan biến. Tan.' / 'Không phải ký ức hoàn hảo. Ký ức thật.' — this is a common AI-generated parallelism pattern.

Several emotional beats are explained rather than enacted: 'Không phải vì anh đã chấp nhận. Không phải vì anh đã tha thứ cho chính mình.' — the narrator tells us what the feeling ISN'T before showing what it is.
The counting/number escalation pattern ('Mười lệnh. Một trăm. Một ngàn.' then 'Một triệu' then 'Hai triệu') is a classic AI-generated tension-building device that reads mechanically.
top_3_revisions: Replace the abstract buffer-overflow sequence with a physical, embodied experience: each 'million commands' should cost Cường a specific sensory capability or memory. Show him losing the smell of ozone, then the feeling of his own heartbeat, then the ability to perceive temperature — make the reader feel him being erased in real time, not watching a percentage counter.

Rename 'Lan' to 'Nàng' or 'Kẻ Đuổi' unless the name was established in a previous chapter not provided. If it was established, the transition from 'Kẻ Đuổi' to 'Lan' should be noted as a significant emotional beat — using her name for the first time is itself a choice that deserves weight.

Cut or compress the wandering-in-white-space opening (first ~500 words). The chapter's emotional core is the final conversation with Lan — everything before it should build toward that, not delay it. Consider starting closer to the gác xép, with the buffer overload happening as they speak, raising the stakes of every line of dialogue.
new_canon_entries: Cường's server deletion method: flooding the neural buffer with write override commands until overflow (new mechanic, needs grounding in established rules)
The name 'Lan' for Kẻ Đuổi (if not established in earlier chapters, this is a significant addition)
Vết sẹo on Cường's xương sườn trái dissolves when Lan is fully freed — resolving the physical mark of their connection
Cường's final brain damage: 95.1% and rising, leaving him paralyzed but conscious, able to hear and feel but not move or speak
The green dot / 4ms signal in the buffer — possibly a remnant of Lan's consciousness or a new phenomenon
